artPrompt: A boxy construct bureaucrat with a single glowing eye-lens, mechanical arms clutching tumbling dice and a blank illegible tally scroll, sparks spitting from its joints amid election-night chaos, flame-orange wash flaring up the wide frame against night-black smoke. A bonfire glints off its riveted plating. All clanking, indignant motion. Anarchic mayhem, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: The Honorable Recount-Bot 5000
text:
Recount 3 — Whenever The Honorable Recount-Bot 5000 attacks, roll a six-sided die. If you roll a 3 or less, roll it again and use the new result. (When the first count is too small, it simply counts again.)
Whenever you roll a die, put a +1/+1 counter on The Honorable Recount-Bot 5000.
{R}: Reroll target die you rolled this turn. Activate this ability only once each turn.
flavorText: BEEP. THE NUMBERS ARE WRONG. BEEP. THE NUMBERS ARE STILL WRONG. BEEP.
